seoTitle: Malua Bay vs Manchester Square — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Malua Bay and Manchester Square. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Malua Bay vs Manchester Square: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Malua Bay and Manchester Square.
heading: Malua Bay vs Manchester Square — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Malua Bay, New South Wales and Manchester Square, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Malua Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Manchester Square (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Malua Bay or Manchester Square safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Malua Bay has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Manchester Square scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Malua Bay scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Manchester Square scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Malua Bay or Manchester Square?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Malua Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
